summary: Tested new Screenshot Import feature for AI-powered financial data extraction from Vendoo Analytics screenshots. All backend API tests (50) passed. Frontend E2E tests verified: Financials section accessible in Admin Dashboard, Screenshot Import modal with Take Photo/Choose File buttons, Add Income modal with form fields, Manage Data modal with tabs. Screenshot analysis endpoint validates file types correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests use years 2097-2099 to avoid conflicts with production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Screenshot Import feature fully tested: 1) POST /api/financials/screenshot/analyze accepts image files and uses AI (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) to extract financial data (gross_revenue, net_profit, items_sold, items_listed, avg_sale_price, platform, date_range, fees, shipping_cost), 2) ScreenshotImportModal in FinancialsSection.jsx opens via 'Scan' button with Take Photo and Choose File options, 3) After AI extraction, user can edit values and save as income entry, 4) 'Save & Add Another' flow works - after saving, shows confirmation and '+ Add Another Month' button that resets form for continuous data entry, 5) Manual income entry via Add Income modal also works. All data-testid attributes present: screenshot-import-btn, add-income-btn, manage-data-btn, financials-summary-cards, gross-sales-card.

financials_section_accessible.details: Financials section visible in Admin Dashboard under Operations & Reports with summary cards (Gross Sales, COGS, Deductions, Net Profit)

screenshot_import_modal.details: Screenshot Import modal opens when clicking Scan button, displays Take Photo and Choose File buttons

add_income_modal.details: Add Income modal opens with Platform dropdown, Month dropdown, Total Sales Amount input, 1099 checkbox, and Notes field

screenshot_analyze_api.details: POST /api/financials/screenshot/analyze validates file types (rejects non-images), accepts images and returns extracted data structure

income_crud_api.details: Income entries can be created, read, updated, and deleted via API

manage_data_modal.details: Manage Data modal opens with tabs for Income, COGS, Expenses, and Mileage
